summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI testing of LUNARIS premium static landing page. Verified all sections (Header, Hero, Services, Templates carousel, Portfolio, Testimonials, Trust Stats, Plans, Support, Final CTA, Footer), all WhatsApp CTAs, anchor navigation, mobile menu, floating WhatsApp button, and responsive behavior at desktop (1920px) and mobile (414px). All 78+ checks passed. No critical issues found. Backend testing skipped per request (pure static site).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Service highlight badge in Services.jsx (line 32) renders text as 'Destaque' but uses CSS uppercase. Functional/visual is fine; just note that text-content based test assertions should use case-insensitive comparison.
Minor: Plans testids use plan name (plan-card-start/growth/premium) rather than indexed (plan-card-0). Consistent with naming pattern but worth documenting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static landing page at https://lunaris-cosmic.preview.emergentagent.com. All WhatsApp CTAs link to https://wa.me/5511999999999 and open in new tab (target=_blank, rel=noopener). Plans use testid pattern plan-card-{name} (start/growth/premium). Service highlight badge text is 'Destaque' rendered uppercase via CSS - use case-insensitive checks. All inView animations require scrolling through page to trigger.
verified_features: Header: logo, 6 nav links (hero, solucoes, templates, portfolio, planos, suporte), Pedir Orçamento WhatsApp CTA
Hero: headline with 'resultados' purple glow, both CTAs (WhatsApp wa.me link + #solucoes anchor), trust strip
Services: 5 cards rendered with DESTAQUE badge on Plataforma Full-Stack para Restaurantes
Templates: 5 template cards (all R$ 499), prev/next buttons functional, dots clickable, carousel state changes correctly
Portfolio: 4 project cards + 3 testimonials (Rafael Martins, Juliana Mendes, Carlos Silva)
Plans: 3 cards (Start R$799, Growth R$1.499 with MAIS ESCOLHIDO badge, Premium R$2.999), all CTAs link to WhatsApp
Support section: rendered with astronaut image and 7 support feature items
Final CTA: 'concorrente' headline + WhatsApp button working
Footer: logo, nav links, WhatsApp (11) 99999-9999, contato@lunaris.com.br, social icons (instagram, linkedin, facebook)
Floating WhatsApp button: appears after scroll>400px and is clickable with green color and pulse animation
Mobile menu: opens via hamburger, contains all 6 nav + WhatsApp CTA, closes on link click and toggle
Responsive: works at 1920x1080 desktop and 414x900 mobile
